历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5133→4852→4475→4085→4337, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 1048 places from 2021 to 2024, a slight backward movement to 4337 in 2025, and a fluctuation of about ±250 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4337 places; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 83 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 69 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 87, an expansion of 18 students (+26.1%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and has a diluting effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd in the main ranking of Soft Science 2026, with a stable ranking in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic science and engineering universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving disputes over student hardship identification and associate professor ethics violations, but Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 33rd, 27 videos), overall attention is not low; there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line in 2022, but the impact was limited; Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024 (heat_index 76.86), Computer majors recommended, both are socially highly concerned hot directions; Hubei Province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 251,400, a slight increase of about 0.64% compared to 2025, competition slightly intensifies; University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Hubei Province, with no local enrollment preference; in 2025, it enrolled 69 students in Physics Category in Hubei, a relatively small proportion, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 4337, the competitive dilution effect of a significant 26.1% expansion in 2026, the slight 0.64% increase in Hubei Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the university's top electronic information discipline strength and high social attention, the expansion effect is expected to dominate, leading to a significant backward shift in ranking; the predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is about 4936, with a range of 4436–5436.

University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has top national strength in electronic information and computer disciplines, with broad employment prospects for related majors, worthy of serious consideration.
